entries.title: Surface Upgrade + Controls Reference
entries.summary: Wrote QA expectations, ran the local server command, and reviewed shop/controls implementation; requirements appear satisfied based on code inspection. Manual in-browser purchase verification was not performed.

fields.Summary: Wrote QA expectations, ran the local server command, and reviewed shop/controls implementation; requirements appear satisfied based on code inspection. Manual in-browser purchase verification was not performed.
fields.Commands: ls, cat agents/entrypoints/_check.md, cat agents/outline.md, cat agents/work/task.md, cat agents/work/quickfix.md, cat agents/roles/rubric-maker.md, cat > agents/work/expectations.md, cat agents/historylog.md, git status --short, git diff --stat, sed -n '1,260p' corebound/game.js, sed -n '260,620p' corebound/game.js, sed -n '1,240p' corebound/index.html, sed -n '1,240p' corebound/style.css, cat agents/roles/tester.md, python -m http.server, ps -ef | rg 'http.server', kill 585
fields.Decisions: Accepted code inspection for purchase/controls behavior; noted missing manual in-browser validation.

entries.details:
- Summary: Wrote QA expectations, ran the local server command, and reviewed shop/controls implementation; requirements appear satisfied based on code inspection. Manual in-browser purchase verification was not performed.
- Files touched: agents/work/expectations.md, agents/historylog.md, agents/orchestrate_status.md
- Commands: ls, cat agents/entrypoints/_check.md, cat agents/outline.md, cat agents/work/task.md, cat agents/work/quickfix.md, cat agents/roles/rubric-maker.md, cat > agents/work/expectations.md, cat agents/historylog.md, git status --short, git diff --stat, sed -n '1,260p' corebound/game.js, sed -n '260,620p' corebound/game.js, sed -n '1,240p' corebound/index.html, sed -n '1,240p' corebound/style.css, cat agents/roles/tester.md, python -m http.server, ps -ef | rg 'http.server', kill 585
- Decisions: Accepted code inspection for purchase/controls behavior; noted missing manual in-browser validation.
- Follow-ups: Optional manual browser check to confirm capacity increases and button disable states in play.
- Prompt: agents/work/prompts/002-surface-upgrade-controls.md
- Report artifacts: none

entries.title: Surface Upgrade + Controls Reference
entries.summary: Added a surface shop section with a single inventory-capacity upgrade, wired purchase logic gated by cash and surface depth, and replaced the single-line controls text with an on-screen controls panel. No refactor changes were needed.

fields.Summary: Added a surface shop section with a single inventory-capacity upgrade, wired purchase logic gated by cash and surface depth, and replaced the single-line controls text with an on-screen controls panel. No refactor changes were needed.
fields.Commands: ls, cat agents/entrypoints/_start.md, cat agents/outline.md, cat agents/work/task.md, ls agents/work/prompts, cat agents/roles/prompt-architect.md, head -n 40 agents/historylog.md, cat <<'EOF' > agents/work/prompts/002-surface-upgrade-controls.md, cat agents/roles/developer.md, cat agents/work/prompts/002-surface-upgrade-controls.md, rg -n "inventory|capacity|cash|hud|depth" corebound/game.js, rg -n "hud|controls|shop" corebound/index.html, rg -n "hud|controls|shop" corebound/style.css, sed -n '1,220p' corebound/game.js, sed -n '220,520p' corebound/game.js, cat corebound/index.html, cat corebound/style.css, apply_patch (x3), python3 -m http.server, cat agents/roles/refactor.md, cat agents/work/quickfix.md
fields.Decisions: Treated the upgrade as a one-time purchase and surfaced its status by switching the Buy button label to Owned after purchase.

entries.details:
- Summary: Added a surface shop section with a single inventory-capacity upgrade, wired purchase logic gated by cash and surface depth, and replaced the single-line controls text with an on-screen controls panel. No refactor changes were needed.
- Files touched: agents/work/prompts/002-surface-upgrade-controls.md, agents/work/task.md, corebound/game.js, corebound/index.html, corebound/style.css, agents/historylog.md
- Commands: ls, cat agents/entrypoints/_start.md, cat agents/outline.md, cat agents/work/task.md, ls agents/work/prompts, cat agents/roles/prompt-architect.md, head -n 40 agents/historylog.md, cat <<'EOF' > agents/work/prompts/002-surface-upgrade-controls.md, cat agents/roles/developer.md, cat agents/work/prompts/002-surface-upgrade-controls.md, rg -n "inventory|capacity|cash|hud|depth" corebound/game.js, rg -n "hud|controls|shop" corebound/index.html, rg -n "hud|controls|shop" corebound/style.css, sed -n '1,220p' corebound/game.js, sed -n '220,520p' corebound/game.js, cat corebound/index.html, cat corebound/style.css, apply_patch (x3), python3 -m http.server, cat agents/roles/refactor.md, cat agents/work/quickfix.md
- Decisions: Treated the upgrade as a one-time purchase and surfaced its status by switching the Buy button label to Owned after purchase.
- Follow-ups: Manual in-browser click test to confirm capacity increases and button disable states.
- Prompt: agents/work/prompts/002-surface-upgrade-controls.md
- Report artifacts: none

entries.title: Depth-Weighted Ore + Surface Selling

entries.title: Depth-Weighted Ore + Surface Selling
entries.summary: Added depth-weighted ore seeding, a surface-only Sell button, and cash handling with HUD updates. Verification failed because `python` is not installed, so the run is blocked.

fields.Summary: Added depth-weighted ore seeding, a surface-only Sell button, and cash handling with HUD updates. Verification failed because `python` is not installed, so the run is blocked.
fields.Files touched: agents/work/prompts/001-depth-weighted-ore-surface-selling.md, agents/work/task.md, corebound/game.js, corebound/index.html, corebound/style.css, agents/historylog.md, agents/orchestrate_status.md
fields.Commands: ls, cat agents/entrypoints/_start.md, cat agents/outline.md, cat agents/work/task.md, ls agents/work/prompts, cat agents/roles/prompt-architect.md, cat README.md, cat <<'EOF' > agents/work/prompts/001-depth-weighted-ore-surface-selling.md, apply_patch, cat agents/roles/developer.md, cat agents/work/prompts/001-depth-weighted-ore-surface-selling.md, ls corebound, cat corebound/game.js, cat corebound/index.html, cat corebound/style.css, apply_patch (x2), cat agents/work/quickfix.md, cat agents/roles/refactor.md, timeout 2s python -m http.server (FAILED: python not found), cat agents/historylog.md

entries.details:
- Summary: Added depth-weighted ore seeding, a surface-only Sell button, and cash handling with HUD updates. Verification failed because `python` is not installed, so the run is blocked.
- Files touched: agents/work/prompts/001-depth-weighted-ore-surface-selling.md, agents/work/task.md, corebound/game.js, corebound/index.html, corebound/style.css, agents/historylog.md, agents/orchestrate_status.md
- Commands: ls, cat agents/entrypoints/_start.md, cat agents/outline.md, cat agents/work/task.md, ls agents/work/prompts, cat agents/roles/prompt-architect.md, cat README.md, cat <<'EOF' > agents/work/prompts/001-depth-weighted-ore-surface-selling.md, apply_patch, cat agents/roles/developer.md, cat agents/work/prompts/001-depth-weighted-ore-surface-selling.md, ls corebound, cat corebound/game.js, cat corebound/index.html, cat corebound/style.css, apply_patch (x2), cat agents/work/quickfix.md, cat agents/roles/refactor.md, timeout 2s python -m http.server (FAILED: python not found), cat agents/historylog.md
- Decisions: Implemented depth-based ore weighting to bias higher-value ore deeper while also increasing overall ore density with depth; Sell button hides unless at depth 0 with inventory.
- Follow-ups: Install `python` or update the verification command to `python3 -m http.server`, then rerun verification.
- Prompt: agents/work/prompts/001-depth-weighted-ore-surface-selling.md
- Report artifacts: none

entries.title: Digging + Inventory + Ore Types
entries.summary: Added ore metadata, digging, and a capped inventory with HUD updates for the Corebound prototype. Verification command failed because `python` is not installed.

fields.Summary: Added ore metadata, digging, and a capped inventory with HUD updates for the Corebound prototype. Verification command failed because `python` is not installed.
fields.Commands: ls, cat agents/entrypoints/_start.md, cat agents/outline.md, cat agents/work/task.md, ls agents/work/prompts, cat agents/roles/prompt-architect.md, cat <<'EOF' > agents/work/prompts/001-digging-inventory-ore.md, apply_patch (x10), cat agents/roles/developer.md, cat agents/work/prompts/001-digging-inventory-ore.md, sed -n '1,240p' corebound/game.js, sed -n '1,240p' corebound/index.html, rg -n "world\\[" corebound/game.js, python -m http.server (FAILED: python not found), cat agents/historylog.md

entries.summary: Decomposed the Corebound vertical-slice spec into six ordered task cards spanning scaffold, world gen, digging/inventory, selling, upgrade, and hardening. Moved the spec from staging to specs and queued tasks in the backlog.
